steps.title: Read the slope sign from the graph
steps.content: The line rises from lower-left to upper-right, so the slope is positive. That eliminates choices B and D, which have $-1.5x$.

steps.title: Read the y-intercept sign from the graph
steps.content: The line crosses the y-axis at a small positive value, so the constant term must be positive. That eliminates choice C (which has $-0.6$).

steps.title: Match the equation
steps.content: Positive slope and positive y-intercept leaves only $y = 0.6 + 1.5x$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
